env._note_discovery_url: FIX vs settings.json: corrected port 9910 -> 9100 and added ?gateway=1. The wrapper's gateway discovery now returns, per model, the EXACT NVIDIA NIM id plus an additional claude-<slug> routing id whose display_name = the exact NIM name (Claude Code's picker only shows ids beginning with claude/anthropic but displays display_name). Selecting a claude-* id routes deterministically back to the real NIM model. Long-term: Claude Code picks dynamically from the live NVIDIA NIM catalog instead of hardcoding ANTHROPIC_MODEL.
